sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.18 adds automatic same-site redirect resolution when you submit a URL to scan. If a submitted URL server-redirects to its canonical address on the same registrable domain (for example a bare domain redirecting to its www host or a language path, like example.com to www.example.com/en), the scanner now follows that redirect and scans the resolved page instead of the redirect gateway, so redirecting and bare-domain targets are analysed correctly instead of returning a near-empty result. The results table shows the resolved URL with a small "resolved from <your submitted URL>" note for transparency. Cross-domain redirects are never followed (the submitted URL is scanned as-is), and your reserved and billed domain is unchanged. Resolution and display only; no billing change.
